## 👨‍💻 About Me

```yaml
name: Abhishek Jha
role: AI Founder
company: Spinach Digital
location: Mumbai, India
focus: ["AI Infrastructure", "Developer Tools", "Open Source"]
languages: ["TypeScript", "Python", "Go (learning)"]
building: ["Trip to Yatra", "OmniRoute Tooling", "Spinach Labs"]
```

**Founder of Spinach Digital** — evolving an AI agency into an AI product company. I build developer tools, AI infrastructure, and open-source projects that compound.

Currently shipping **Trip to Yatra** (an AI Marketing OS with 17 specialized agents) and **MCP tooling** for the Claude/MCP ecosystem.

> _"Build in public. Open source by default. Everything should compound."_

</td>
</tr>
</table>
